hooks.command: bash -c 'p=$(jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty"); echo "$p" | grep -qE "/egras/(src|migrations)/|/egras/Cargo\.toml$" && echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PostToolUse\",\"additionalContext\":\"REMINDER: You just edited backend code/migrations. Before ending the turn, update the relevant note(s) in knowledge/wiki/. See CLAUDE.md > Wiki sync.\"}}" || true'
